paper_title: Genome Sequencing and Assembly of S. aterrima and S. pratorum

methods.description: Collection of live male adult specimens of S. aterrima and S. pratorum, followed by DNA and RNA extraction and sequencing library preparation.

steps.description: Live male adult specimens of S. aterrima and S. pratorum were collected at Baitan Lake.
steps.searchable_summary: collect live specimens of S. aterrima and S. pratorum

steps.description: After sample collection, the whole bodies of samples were immediately immersed into liquid nitrogen and stored at −80 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: store specimens in liquid nitrogen at -80°C

steps.description: DNA was extracted using the 1D DNA Ligation Sequencing kit SQK-LSK109.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using SQK-LSK109 kit

steps.description: RNA was extracted with the TRIzol ™ Reagent kit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA using TRIzol Reagent kit

steps.description: A paired-end sequencing library (350 bp in length) was constructed and sequenced using the Beijing Genomics Institute (BGI).
steps.searchable_summary: construct and sequence paired-end library at BGI

steps.description: A Single Molecule Real-Time DNA library was prepared for sequencing using SQK-LSK109 Kit with an insert size of 30 kb.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare SMRT DNA library with SQK-LSK109

methods.description: Quality control, k-mer analysis, and assembly of genomic data to estimate genome size and assemble contigs.

steps.description: Quality control of the BGI data was carried out by BBTools v38.82.
steps.searchable_summary: perform quality control on BGI data using BBTools

steps.description: The k-mer frequencies were assessed using 'khist.sh' (BBTools) with a length set to 21 k-mer.
steps.searchable_summary: assess k-mer frequencies using khist.sh

steps.description: The k-mer analysis was then performed using GenomeScope v2.0 with a maximum k-mer coverage of 1,000.
steps.searchable_summary: perform k-mer analysis using GenomeScope

steps.description: For genomic contig assembly, the ONT raw data were error-corrected by NextDenovo v2.5.0.
steps.searchable_summary: error-correct ONT data using NextDenovo

steps.description: Filtered for contaminated sequences using Kraken v2.1.2.
steps.searchable_summary: filter contaminated sequences using Kraken

steps.description: Assembled using NextDenovo software with parameters read_cutoff = 1k.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble genome using NextDenovo

steps.description: One round of long sequence correction using Inspector v1.2 and two rounds of short sequence correction with NextPolish v1.3.0.
steps.searchable_summary: correct sequences using Inspector and NextPolish

steps.description: Minimap2 v.2.17 was employed as the read mapper during long and short-read polishing stages.
steps.searchable_summary: map reads using Minimap2

steps.description: Adapter sequences of raw reads were trimmed and low-quality reads were removed using Juicer v1.6.2.
steps.searchable_summary: trim adapters and remove low-quality reads using Juicer

steps.description: Clean reads were mapped to the draft genome into the chromosome using 3D-DNA.
steps.searchable_summary: map clean reads to draft genome using 3D-DNA

steps.description: Juicebox v1.11.08 was used to correct possible errors in the candidate assembly by visualizing Hi-C heatmaps.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize and correct assembly using Juicebox

steps.description: Possible contaminants were detected using MMseqs. 2 v11, which performed BLASTN-like searches.
steps.searchable_summary: detect contaminants using MMseqs

steps.description: The completeness of the genome was evaluated using BUSCO v3.0.2 with insecta_odb10 dataset.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate genome completeness using BUSCO

steps.description: The genomes of S. aterrima and S. pratorum were assembled into three chromosomes.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble genomes into chromosomes
